rationale: The cited paper is a close methodological and substantive predecessor: it examines Wal-Mart entry effects on incumbent retailers using DID/natural-experiment logic, while the citing paper explicitly states it extends prior Wal-Mart-entry work focused on incumbents/consumers to the supplier side. Given this direct topical continuity (entry effects, mechanisms via retailer behavior/assortment) and exact DOI match, this is plausibly foundational/comparative rather than an incidental mention.
